prompt: [PROMPT: COMPLEX DYNAMIC WHITENED ISOMETRIC ILLUSTRATION] A dynamic, complex isometric illustration with clean black outlines and soft-cell shading, in the 'Whitened Dynamic Conceptual' style. A compact, centered composition with no people. A complex fragmented semi-circular dial gauge in isometric 3D perspective, floating slightly above center on a subtle White #FFFFFF platform. The dial has 4 colored arc sections: leftmost dark #111111 ('Closed'), Blue #6C82FE ('Minimal'), Blue #6C82FE with White #FFFFFF fragmented faces ('Selective'), rightmost Orange #F59400 ('Open'). A bold Orange #F59400 needle pointer sits on 'Selective.' The dial structure uses intentionally fragmented 3D geometry with specific Pure White #FFFFFF faces for whiteness and light. A small padlock icon (#111111 outlines, Blue #6C82FE fill) floats near the left Closed end of the dial. Near the right Open end, a small shield icon (Orange #F59400 fill) with a checkmark. From the dial center, three thin precise lines radiate outward to small floating conceptual icons at varying opacity levels: a music note (Orange #F59400, fully visible and solid), a health cross (Pink #FC6978, semi-ghosted and translucent), and a location pin (Blue #6C82FE, fully visible and solid). The varying visibility represents selective information sharing — some domains shared, others kept private. A gentle Orange #F59400 curved arrow sweeps below the dial, suggesting the dial position can change over time. No people in this composition. Extensive light gray #EEEEEE background space creating airiness. All elements have precise #111111 outlines. Soft-cell shading only, no realistic gradients. Element White #FFFFFF used strategically for cleanliness.
